item.title: How Redis handles a million connections without breaking a sweat
item.description: Redis is single-threaded. It should be slow. It is not. Here is why.

item.title: My first week of Go: building a tiny TCP server
item.description: How I built a TCP server in Go from scratch and what actually made things click.

item.title: Hello, World (from a sleeping cat)
item.description: Spinning up a cutesy retro dev blog that lives entirely on GitHub Pages.
